program.title: Bachelor of Science in Food Science and Technology
program.description: This program is designed to address the demand of the food industry and academic research institutions for highly trained manpower in this field. This technology-based curriculum is relevant and responsive to the needs of the modern times and society towards sustained economic development. This will provide students technical and entrepreneurial knowledge and skills to face the continuing challenges in the food industry. The students may opt for a program with thesis or with practicum and special problem. Fields of Specialization are Food Chemistry, Food Microbiology, and Food Engineering.
